metadata.title: Sana's Sweet Bakery — Rotterdam
metadata.description: Bread, pastries and patisserie. Baked fresh with love — formerly Bakkerij Oued Fes.

brand.headerNote: Rotterdam · shop still Bakkerij Oued Fes
brand.heroNote: We're updating our name — for now, the shop sign outside still reads Bakkerij Oued Fes.
brand.visitNote: You'll still find us in store under the name Bakkerij Oued Fes for now.

home.heroSubtitle: Bread, pastries and patisserie with a personal touch — fresh from our oven every day in Rotterdam.
home.visitText: Taste our specialties in store or get in touch with any questions.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Discover our selection of authentic Moroccan delicacies
menu.selectCategoryHint: Pick a category to browse our products.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our story
about.imageAlt: Baker at work by the oven with fresh pastries
about.p1: Sana's Sweet Bakery is a fresh chapter built on flavours you already love. We bake with renewed energy, keep the classics close, and add something sweet to the counter every day. You'll still find us in store under Bakkerij Oued Fes for now.
about.p2: Every morning we bake fresh khobz, msemen and an extensive selection of pastries. We use only the finest ingredients — from almond paste to orange blossom water.
about.p3: Step inside and experience the warmth of a true Moroccan bakery. We look forward to welcoming you.
about.value1Text: Authentic recipes, passed down through generations.
about.value2Text: Baked fresh daily, never from yesterday.
about.value3Text: Everyone is welcome — just like home in Morocco.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Visit us or get in touch
contact.visitNote: You'll still find us in store under the name Bakkerij Oued Fes for now.

footer.tagline: Sweet bakery in Rotterdam — new name on the way
footer.blurb: Traditional bread, refined pastries and warm hospitality — baked fresh daily in Rotterdam.
